herbs.herb_desc: Aloe vera gel is a soothing and hydrating substance extracted from the leaves of the aloe vera plant, widely used for its numerous health benefits. Its anti-inflammatory properties help to calm irritated skin and reduce redness, making it an effective remedy for sunburns and minor cuts. Additionally, aloe vera gel has been shown to promote skin elasticity and collagen production, contributing to a more youthful and radiant complexion.
